raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The cup is directly in front of box_2, clear space exists above it, and the right arm can descend without colliding with the boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted off the table, eliminating any risk of collision during subsequent box manipulation."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_front_left_corner",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the front-left corner of the table is free of objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed on the front-left corner of the table, well away from both boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm has unobstructed access to the left face of box_2 and there is at least 10 cm of free space to the right on the tabletop.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated ~10 cm to the right, creating a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 and disengaging their attached faces."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A sufficient gap now exists around box_1 for both arms to approach its left and right faces; there are no objects above the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted several centimetres above the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is directly in front of box_2, clear space exists above it, and the right arm can descend without colliding with the boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted off the table, eliminating any risk of collision during subsequent box manipulation.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the front-left corner of the table is free of objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed on the front-left corner of the table, well away from both boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm has unobstructed access to the left face of box_2 and there is at least 10 cm of free space to the right on the tabletop.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated ~10 cm to the right, creating a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 and disengaging their attached faces.

parsed_json.Precondition: A sufficient gap now exists around box_1 for both arms to approach its left and right faces; there are no objects above the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted several centimetres above the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box.
